title: MPV Blood Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
MPV blood test. Your age, sex, race and ethnicity, lifestyle (diet, smoking, drinking alcohol, physical activity), and genes can affect both your MPV and platelet counts.
References 
Bessman JD, Gilmer PR, Gardner FH. Use of mean platelet volume improves detection of platelet disorders. Blood Cells [Internet]. 1985 [cited 2024 Aug 15]; 11(1):127-35. Available from: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/4074887
